title: Custom Aliquoting
author: Opentrons
description: This protocol uses a p1000 single channel pipette to divide up to forty eight 3 mL clinical samples each into four aliquots with aliquot volumes of 1 mL, 0.5 mL, 0.5 mL and 1 mL. Links: * [Custom Aliquoting](https://protocols.opentrons.com/protocol/7363e4) * [Custom Pooling](https://protocols.opentrons.com/protocol/7363e4-part-2)
steps_raw: This protocol uses a p1000 single channel pipette to divide up to forty eight 3 mL clinical samples each into four aliquots with aliquot volumes of 1 mL, 0.5 mL, 0.5 mL and 1 mL. Links: * [Custom Aliquoting](https://protocols.opentrons.com/protocol/7363e4) * [Custom Pooling](https://protocols.opentrons.com/protocol/7363e4-part-2)
Aspirate 1 mL from the very first clinical sample tube (A1 of either deck slot 8 or deck slot 9).
Dispense 1 mL to the first aliquot tube in A1 deck slot 10 (aliquot 1).
Aspirate another 0.5 mL from the first clinical sample tube in A1.
Dispense 0.5 mL to the second aliquot tube in B1 deck slot 10 (aliquot 2).
Aspirate another 0.5 mL from the first clinical sample tube in A1.
Dispense 0.5 mL to the third aliquot tube in C1 deck slot 10 (aliquot 3).
Aspirate another 1 mL from the first clinical sample tube in A1.
Dispense 1 mL to the fourth aliquot tube in D1 deck slot 10 (aliquot 4).
Repeat for all clinical sample tubes.
